info.title: Scrape Creators API
info.description: The easiest way to scrape public social media data at scale. Extract profiles, posts, videos, comments, and more from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit, and 15+ platforms.

tags.name: YouTube
tags.description: Scrape YouTube channels, videos, and more

get.description: Get comments from a video. Can only get 1k top comments and about 7k new comments.

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: Continuation token to get more comments. Get 'continuationToken' from previous response.

comments.content: I love how in the middle he said "I've been able to work with 2 great coaches... Pete and Coach Tomlin"... Side shade to Coach Sean Payton, love it :)
